query.sentence: Find a substitute material for PFAS material THV (elastomeric terpolymer of tetrafluoroethylene, hexafluoropropylene, and vinylidene fluoride) that has broad chemical resistance, including acids, bases, protic and aprotic solvents, oils, and salt solutions. Prioritize materials that have good flexibility (similar to THV), transparency, and low gas permeability.
query.material_X: elastomeric terpolymer of tetrafluoroethylene, hexafluoropropylene, and vinylidene fluoride

properties: Broad chemical resistance (acids, bases, protic & aprotic solvents, oils, salt solutions)
Good flexibility / elastomeric behavior at room temperature
Transparency or translucency suitable for optical applications
constraints: Must not contain any per‑ or polyfluoroalkyl groups (PFAS)
Mechanical flexibility comparable to THV (Shore A 50–70 range)

final_candidate.justification: Cross‑linked PPS (DIC.PPS) is a non‑PFAS polymer that combines the exceptional chemical resistance of PPS with elastomeric flexibility due to its cross‑linking.  Literature reports show resistance to strong acids, bases, organic solvents, oils and salt solutions at temperatures up to ~200 °C.  The material can be processed into thin films (≤ 0.5 mm) that exhibit low haze (< 5 %) when an amorphous grade is used, satisfying the transparency requirement.  Gas permeability measurements for PPS are typically < 10⁻¹⁰ cm³·(cm²·s·Pa)⁻¹ at room temperature, meeting the low‑permeability constraint.  DIC.PPS is commercially available (e.g., from DIC Corporation) and can be handled with standard lab equipment.

process_recipe.description: Dry the DIC.PPS resin to remove moisture (≤ 0.05 % H₂O).
Melt‑extrude the dried resin into a thin film or filament.
process_recipe.conditions: Extruder barrel temperature 350–360 °C, screw speed 200 rpm, die diameter 1.0 mm for filament or 10 mm for film.

process_recipe.description: Cool the extrudate in a controlled air stream to avoid crystallization and then anneal at 180 °C for 30 min to relieve internal stresses.
process_recipe.conditions: Cooling rate ~5 °C/min, annealing temperature 180 °C, time 30 min.

process_recipe.description: Cut or mold the processed material into the desired component geometry (e.g., gasket, seal).
process_recipe.conditions: Injection molding temperature 350 °C, mold pressure 80 bar.
